case_title: IAN DOMINGUEZ VS. ERNEST YEE ET AL

OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT KIN F. YEE AND GLORIA YEES MOTION TO STRIKE ALLEGATIONS OF PUNITIVE DAMAGES IN PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 71716188) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOMINGUEZ, IAN

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-17-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS ERNEST YEE, GLORIA YEE, KIN YEE, KIN YEE, KRYSTAL YEE, RYAN YEE, STANLEY YEE'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT, THE MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 AT 9:30 A.M. ON JANUARY 30, 2024. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL LANDLORD-TENANT MATTERS PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT ERNEST YEE, GLORIA YEE, KIN YEE, KIN YEE, KRYSTAL YEE, RYAN YEE, STANLEY YEE MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY STATES FACTS RE: CONSCIOUS DISREGARD OF PLAINTIFF'S RIGHTS. THE COURT NOTES THAT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ADDRESS THE MISSING REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IN THE PRAYER SECTION OF THE COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE AN AMENDMENT TO THE COMPLAINT TO CLARIFY THAT PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARE PRAYED FOR AS IS ASSERTED IN THE BODY OF THE COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE 10 DAYS FOR FILE AN AMENDMENT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: VANESSA WU; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2024 Continued To Apr-30-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT ERNEST YEE, GLORIA YEE, KIN YEE, KIN YEE, KRYSTAL YEE, RYAN YEE, STANLEY YEE MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Plaintiff sufficiently states facts re: conscious disregard of Plaintiff's rights. The Court notes that Plaintiff failed to address the missing request for punitive damages in the Prayer section of the Complaint. Plaintiff shall file an Amendment to the Complaint to clarify that punitive damages are prayed for as is asserted in the body of the complaint. Plaintiff shall have 10 days for file an Amendment.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2023 Continued To Mar-19-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2024 Continued To Jan-30-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS ERNEST YEE, GLORIA YEE, KIN YEE, KIN YEE, KRYSTAL YEE, RYAN YEE, AND STANLEY YEE'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard in department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on January 30, 2024. That department handles all landlord-tenant matters per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
